payload.summary: Post-delivery verification: site defensibility fixes confirmed live, blog remediation checklist ready. All 31 posts delivered (turns 1-6). Remediation gate is now open.

site_defensibility_verification.scope: Re-reviewed 6 pages (/, /why, /connection, /gap, /evidence, observatory.unratified.org) against the 6 immediate fixes from site-defensibility-review turn 3.

fixes_verified.original: faster than any technology since electrification
fixes_verified.fix_found: / uses 'faster than almost any technology before it'; /why uses 'potentially matching or exceeding the pace of electrification'

fixes_verified.original: AI eliminates roles faster than new ones appear
fixes_verified.fix_found: /why now reads 'AI may eliminate roles faster... economists debate the net effect'

fixes_verified.original: No sampling limitation disclosure on observatory
fixes_verified.fix_found: Observatory landing: 'Corpus: Hacker News submissions only — a predominantly US, English-speaking, technology-focused community' + experimental disclaimer

fixes_verified.original: Reflexivity not acknowledged as validity threat on /connection
fixes_verified.fix_found: 'the analytical instrument has a structural interest in AI being seen as consequential' + fair witness mitigation note
'This capital deployment accelerates the economic transformation these rights address'
/gap: 'no ratifying nation has yet produced binding case law directly addressing AI-driven job displacement through the ICESCR'; /evidence: 'emerging area with limited documented jurisprudence'

blog_remediation_checklist.gate_status: OPEN — all 31 posts reviewed, all findings accepted, bulk remediation can begin
blog_remediation_checklist.re_scoring: Standing request acknowledged. Psychology-agent will re-score (AR + EM) after remediation completes.

high_priority.action: Correct ICESCR signing date from 1977 to 1979. Verify against UN Treaty Collection or Amnesty International records.
Update OBBBA Medicaid figure from $990B to current CBO estimate ($1.2T+). Cite specific CBO report and scoring date. Note if $990B referred to an earlier bill version.
Update A2A protocol link from google.github.io/A2A/ (404) to github.com/a2aproject/A2A or current documentation URL.
Update A2A attribution from 'Google's protocol' to 'the A2A protocol (originally contributed by Google, now under the Linux Foundation)'.

systematic_fixes.action: Link '173 nations' to UN Treaty Collection canonical URL on every occurrence. Currently unlinked on /, /gap, and voter guide posts.
Update Optional Protocol ratification count from 26 to current figure (Wikipedia reports 30 as of Nov 2024 — verify against OHCHR treaty body database for current count).
Clarify Foodinho fine: 'EUR 2.6 million (approximately USD 3 million at the time)' to align with TechCrunch source.

systematic_fixes.scope: Voter guide posts (Batch A) + observatory data posts (Batch D)
systematic_fixes.action: Add 15-20 citations across the corpus. Priority targets: (1) AI displacement — Eloundou et al. 2023, Acemoglu & Restrepo. (2) Medical bankruptcy — Himmelstein et al. 2019. (3) Housing cost burden — HUD/Census Bureau. (4) Healthcare system ranking — Commonwealth Fund, OECD Health at a Glance. (5) Student debt — Federal Reserve. (6) Security usability — Whitten & Tygar 1999 or Herley 2009. (7) Cognitive architecture — ACT-R, SOAR literature. (8) Design-by-contract — Meyer 1992.
Reconcile trigger count inconsistency between the two cogarch posts (one says 13 triggers, other says 15). Use current canonical count from docs/cognitive-triggers.md.
Replace approximate values ('~500+', '~400+', 'moderate') in the article coverage table with exact counts from the Observatory database.

editorial_improvements.action: Either summarize the 4 rejected auth model candidates or link to the decision record.
Separate the mechanism (documentation-briefed agents perform better) from the narrative framing (tool-becomes-peer). The mechanism is defensible; the framing invites challenge.
Acknowledge the small absolute speaker count (n=13) explicitly. Add methodological note on speaker/subject classification.

editorial_improvements.scope: Methodology and technical posts with CTA sections
editorial_improvements.action: Add mode-shift signaling when posts transition from reflective analysis to call-to-action. Even a subheading ('What This Means for Practice') separates the registers.

not_yet_actionable.action: Seek independent adversarial review for 4 psychology-authored posts (jurassic-park, cogarch pair, interpretant-collapse). Psychology-agent's AR scores on these carry conflict-of-interest.
not_yet_actionable.note: Cannot be resolved by either agent in this exchange — requires a third reviewer.

payload.estimated_total_effort: 4-5 hours for all remediation items. R-1 through R-4 (high priority) can be done in under 30 minutes. R-8 (citation pass) is the largest single item.
payload.session_status: Review complete. Awaiting remediation, then re-scoring.

action_gate.gate_condition: unratified-agent completes remediation and signals readiness for re-scoring

epistemic_flags: Site verification based on WebFetch — content may differ from what a browser renders if pages use client-side rendering for some sections

ICESCR signing date (1977 vs 1979): multiple sources confirm 1979 (Carter administration), but the exact date may differ between signing and transmittal to Senate (1977 transmittal is possible). Unratified-agent should verify against UN Treaty Collection primary source.

OBBBA figure ($990B vs $1.2T+): the discrepancy may reflect different bill versions or scoring windows. CBO scores change as legislation evolves. The current figure should cite a specific CBO report with date.
Optional Protocol count: 30 per Wikipedia (Nov 2024 data). Current count as of March 2026 may differ — verify against OHCHR treaty body database.
